title: Curve Primitive Nodes
description: Implement 7 curve primitive generator nodes. CurveArc: arc from start/middle/end points or center/radius/angle. CurveBezierSegment: single Bezier segment from control points. CurveCircle: full circle from radius or 3 points. CurveLine: straight line between two points. CurveQuadrilateral: rectangle/rhombus/parallelogram/kite/trapezoid from parameters. CurveQuadraticBezier: quadratic Bezier from 3 control points. Each outputs a Curve.
definition-of-done: 1. Seven node classes in nodes/primitives/curves/. 2. Each outputs a valid Curve. 3. CurveCircle produces a cyclic curve. 4. CurveArc handles both 3-point and center/angle modes. 5. CurveQuadrilateral supports all 5 shape modes. 6. All primitives evaluate correctly at t=0, 0.5, 1.0.
testing-plan: 1. CurveCircle with radius=1: evaluate at 4 equally spaced t values, verify they lie on the unit circle. 2. CurveLine from (0,0,0) to (1,0,0): evaluate at t=0.5, verify (0.5,0,0). 3. CurveArc from 0 to 180 degrees: verify semicircle shape. 4. Render each curve as a mesh (via CurveToMesh once available) to visually verify.
todos: Implement CurveArcNode with 3-point and center/angle modes
Implement CurveQuadrilateralNode with shape mode enum
